introduction.english: A word is a meaningful unit made of letters or sounds.
introduction.hindi: अर्थपूर्ण अक्षरों या ध्वनियों के समूह को शब्द कहते हैं।

introduction.english: A sentence is a group of words that gives complete meaning (expresses a complete thought).
introduction.hindi: पूर्ण अर्थ देने वाले शब्दों के समूह को वाक्य कहते हैं।

introduction.english: Sentences are built from different word groups that work together to form a complete meaning.
introduction.hindi: वाक्य के अंदर अलग-अलग हिस्से (Phrase, Clause) मिलकर एक पूरा अर्थ बनाते हैं।

types.name: Phrase
types.description: A group of words that does not express a complete thought (incomplete meaning group).

types.name: Clause
types.description: A group of words that has its own subject and its own verb.

types.name: Subject
types.description: The part about which something is said (जिसके बारे में कुछ कहा जाए).

types.name: Predicate
types.description: Tells something about the subject (Subject के बारे में जो कुछ कहा जाए).

introduction.english: Word order is the arrangement of words in a sentence.
introduction.hindi: वाक्य में शब्दों को सही क्रम में रखने की प्रक्रिया को word order कहते हैं।

introduction.english: The words that describe the roles played by words in a sentence are called Parts of Speech.
introduction.hindi: वाक्य में शब्द जो-जो भूमिका निभाते हैं, उन्हीं भूमिकाओं के आधार पर उन्हें Parts of Speech कहा जाता है।

types.name: Noun
types.description: The name of a person, place, thing, concept, quality, or state of being.

types.name: Pronoun
types.description: The word that is used instead of a noun or noun phrase to avoid its repetition.

types.name: Adjective
types.description: The word that describes or modifies a noun, pronoun, or noun phrase.

types.name: Verb
types.description: The action or state of being.

types.name: Adverb
types.description: Modifies a verb, adjective, or another adverb.

types.name: Preposition
types.description: Shows relationship between a noun/pronoun and other words.
